quick_skim.title: A Fast Locality Simulator for GEMM Design-Space Exploration on Multi-Chiplet GPUs
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-chiplet GPUs split memory into local and remote HBM regions across a silicon interposer, and reducing the remote HBM traffic is crucial for the performance and energy efficiency of multi-chiplet GPUs. For general matrix multiplication (GEMM), the dominant operator in large language models (LLMs), the resulting inter-chiplet traffic depends strongly on kernel choices such as operand layout, CTA traversal order, and data placement, and the optimal strategy to minimize remote accesses is nontrivial. We present a fast, functional, tile-level locality simulator that models CTA scheduling, per-chiplet L2 caches, and local/remote HBM accesses to evaluate a full-size LLM GEMM configuration. Across representative LLM GEMMs, the simulator shows that remote traffic varies by up to 58x across the design space for the same GEMM dimensions. Moreover, using the simulator as feedback, an agentic AI discovers that a 2D block-swizzle CTA traversal reduces remote traffic over the best 1D traversal by up to 5.1x under round-robin placement, identifying CTA traversal order as a first-order, GEMM-dependent design knob for inter-chiplet traffic.

quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多芯片GPU芯片间流量模拟
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents a fast locality simulator for GEMM on multi-chiplet GPUs, modeling CTA scheduling and local/remote HBM accesses across silicon interposer, enabling exploration of chiplet-level communication optimization.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多芯片GPU上的GEMM计算，提出一个快速局部性模拟器，模拟CTA调度和硅中介层上的本地/远程HBM访问。该模拟器能快速评估全尺寸LLM GEMM配置，帮助探索芯片封装级通信优化，间接支持SI/PI分析中的互连建模与流量评估。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多芯片GPU上的GEMM计算，提出一个快速局部性模拟器，模拟CTA调度和硅中介层上的本地/远程HBM访问。该模拟器能快速评估全尺寸LLM GEMM配置，帮助探索芯片封装级通信优化，间接支持SI/PI分析中的互连建模与流量评估。
